requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter I - Preliminary
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in these Directions does
not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the extant statutory and
regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an
activity, transaction, or item.
requirements.object: statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity, transaction, or item

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
requirements.object: date of issue

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein
shall bear the meaning as assigned to them below:
(1) 'Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR)' shall have the same meaning as defined in
the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and
Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: assigned to them below: (1) 'Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR)' shall have the same meaning as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Local

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Funding Liquidity Risk' means the risk that a bank will not be able to
meet efficiently the expected and unexpected current and future cash
<image>
flows and collateral needs without affecting either its daily operations or its
financial condition.
requirements.object: bank will not be able to meet efficiently the expected and unexpected current and future cash <image> flows and collateral needs witho

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Interest Rate Risk (IRR)' means risk where changes in market interest
rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition.
requirements.object: market interest rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Market Liquidity Risk' means the risk that a bank cannot easily offset or
eliminate a position at the prevailing market price because of inadequate
market depth or market disruption.
requirements.object: bank cannot easily offset or eliminate a position at the prevailing market price because of inadequate market depth or market disrupti

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR)' shall have the same meaning as
defined in Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Cash Reserve
Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall
decide the risk management policy.
requirements.object: management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall set limits for liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange, and
equity price risks.
requirements.object: interest rate, foreign exchange, and equity price risks

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall constitute a Management Committee of the Board or any other
specific committee to oversee the implementation of the Asset Liability
Management (ALM) system and review its functioning periodically.
requirements.object: of the Board or any other specific committee to oversee the implementation of the Asset Liability Management (ALM) s

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative
mismatches (running total) across all time buckets beyond 1-28 days of the
structural liquidity statement (SLS).
requirements.object: limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets beyond 1-28 days of the structural liquidity

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board / Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) shall approve the
volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, and other
parameters of the 'Trading Book' in line with the Reserve Bank of India (Local
Area Banks - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: holding / defeasance period, cut loss, and other parameters of the 'Trading Book' in line with the Reserve Bank of In

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board / Management Committee shall approve the prudential limits on
'Gaps' across individual time buckets for measurement of interest rate
sensitivity.
requirements.object: on 'Gaps' across individual time buckets for measurement of interest rate sensitivity

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board / Management Committee shall approve prudent level of Earnings at
Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM) based on their views on interest rate
movements.
requirements.object: Earnings at Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM) based on their views on interest rate movements

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board / ALCO shall approve the estimation of the behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects related to
classification of demand deposits into core and volatile portion on the basis of
past data / empirical studies.
requirements.object: the behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects related to classification of demand dep

requirements.full_sentence:
Top Management / Board shall formulate corrective measures and devise
suitable strategies wherever needed, basis feedback on the interest rate risk
faced by the bank.
requirements.object: devise suitable strategies wherever needed, basis feedback on the interest rate risk faced by the bank

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall serve as a benchmark for ALM systems in a bank.
requirements.object: for ALM systems in a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
ALM,
among other functions concerned with risk management, shall provide a
dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest
rate, foreign exchange (forex), and equity and commodity price risks of a bank
that needs to be closely integrated with the bank's business strategy.
requirements.object: for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange (forex), and equity and commodity price

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall
also involve assessment of various types of risks and dynamically altering the
bank's portfolio to manage the risks.
requirements.object: various types of risks and dynamically altering the bank's portfolio to manage the risks

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALM shall rest on three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems which comprise of
requirements.object: (1) ALM Information Systems which comprise of

requirements.full_sentence: ALM shall be supported by specific risk policies and tolerance limits.
requirements.object: risk policies and tolerance limits

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALM
framework shall be built on sound internal controls, with necessary information
<image>
system as back up.
requirements.object: internal controls, with necessary information <image> system as back up

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALM framework shall ensure the availability of
adequate and accurate information with expedience.
requirements.object: adequate and accurate information with expedience

requirements.full_sentence:
The Top Management of the bank (direct reporting to the MD & CEO and / or
Board) shall be responsible for integrating basic operations and strategic
decision making with risk management, along with successful implementation
of the risk management process.
requirements.object: basic operations and strategic decision making with risk management, along with successful implementation of the risk m

requirements.full_sentence:
Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO)
(1) A bank shall constitute an ALCO consisting of the Top Management
including CEO, which shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the
limits set by the Board as well as for deciding the business strategy of the
bank (on the assets and liabilities sides) in line with the bank's budget and
decided risk management objectives.
requirements.object: of the Top Management including CEO, which shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the limits set by the Board as

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The size (number of members) of the ALCO shall depend on the size of
each bank, business mix and organisational complexity.
requirements.object: of each bank, business mix and organisational complexity

requirements.full_sentence:
The CEO / CMD
or the Executive Director of the bank shall head the ALCO.

Its members
may include the heads of Investment, Credit, Treasury, International
Banking, Risk Management, Economic Research, and other members as
deemed suitable.
requirements.object: Investment, Credit, Treasury, International Banking, Risk Management, Economic Research, and other members as deemed suitable

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall decide the frequency for holding its ALCO
meetings.
requirements.object: holding its ALCO meetings

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The ALCO shall be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet
planning from risk - return perspective, including the strategic
management of interest rate and liquidity risks.
requirements.object: responsible for balance sheet planning from risk - return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate a

requirements.full_sentence:
Each bank shall decide on
the role of its ALCO, its responsibility as also the decisions to be taken by
it.
requirements.object: of its ALCO, its responsibility as also the decisions to be taken by it

requirements.full_sentence:
The business and risk management strategy decided by the Top
Management of the bank shall ensure that the bank operates within the
limits / parameters set by the Board.
requirements.object: operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The business issues that the ALCO shall consider, inter alia, include
product pricing for both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile
and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities, other related matters.
requirements.object: product pricing for both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabiliti

requirements.full_sentence:
In
addition to monitoring the risk levels of the bank, the ALCO shall review
the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the
<image>
previous meetings.
requirements.object: and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the <image> previous meetings

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALCO shall also articulate the current interest rate
view of the bank and base its decisions for future business strategy on
this view.
requirements.object: interest rate view of the bank and base its decisions for future business strategy on this view

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of the funding policy, the ALCO shall be responsible
for deciding on source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets.
requirements.object: on source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALCO
shall develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and
decide on funding mixes, including but not limited to fixed v/s.
requirements.object: future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes, including but not limited to fixed v/s

requirements.full_sentence:
The ALM Support Groups consisting of operating staff shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
requirements.object: monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO

requirements.full_sentence:
The Group
shall also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various
possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and
recommend the action needed to adhere to bank's internal limits.
requirements.object: showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of ALM function shall be as follows:
(1) Liquidity risk management;
requirements.object: Liquidity risk management

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's Top Management shall measure its liquidity positions on an ongoing
basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under
different assumptions.
requirements.object: on an ongoing basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions

requirements.full_sentence:
Liquidity shall be tracked through maturity or cash flow
mismatches, through use of a maturity ladder and calculation of cumulative
surplus or deficit of funds at selected maturity dates.
requirements.object: or cash flow mismatches, through use of a maturity ladder and calculation of cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at sel

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall prepare the SLS on a daily basis as per format provided under
requirements.object: a daily basis as per format provided under

requirements.full_sentence:
The maturity profile as given in Annex-IV shall be used for measuring the future
cash flows of the bank in different time buckets.
requirements.object: the future cash flows of the bank in different time buckets
(1) Next day

requirements.full_sentence:
All cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder shall be placed according to
the expected timing of cash flows.
requirements.object: the expected timing of cash flows

requirements.full_sentence:
A maturing liability shall be a cash outflow
while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
requirements.object: while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall take into account the
Rupee inflows and outflows on account of forex operations.
requirements.object: Rupee inflows and outflows on account of forex operations

requirements.full_sentence:
While determining
<image>
the likely cash inflows / outflows, the bank shall make appropriate assumptions
according to its asset - liability profiles.
requirements.object: to its asset - liability profiles

requirements.full_sentence:
While the mismatches upto one year provide early warning signals of
impending liquidity problems, the bank shall closely monitor the short-term
mismatches, i.e., upto 28 days.
requirements.object: mismatches, i

requirements.full_sentence:
The net cumulative negative mismatches during
the Next day, 2-7 days, 8-14 days, and 15-28 days buckets shall not exceed 5
per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash
outflows in the respective time buckets.
requirements.object: 10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time
buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
requirements.object: (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /

requirements.full_sentence:
While determining the tolerance levels the bank shall
take into account all relevant factors based on its asset-liability base, nature of
business, future strategy, etc.
requirements.object: relevant factors based on its asset-liability base, nature of business, future strategy, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
The investments in SLR securities and other investments shall be shown under
respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity.
requirements.object: maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank maintaining the Held for Trading (HFT) portfolio in accordance with the
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025 shall be permitted to show
these securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the
basis of the defeasance period.
requirements.object: these securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance period

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to monitor its short-term liquidity on a dynamic basis over a time
horizon spanning from 1-90 days, a bank may estimate its short-term liquidity
profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for
planning purposes.
requirements.object: profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
Inter-bank Liability (IBL) Limit
(1) IBL of a bank shall not exceed 200 per cent of its Net Worth as on March
31 of the previous year.
requirements.object: of its Net Worth as on March 31 of the previous year

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may, with the approval of its Board, fix a
lower limit for its IBL, keeping in view its business requirements.
requirements.object: of its Board, fix a lower limit for its IBL, keeping in view its business requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The limit prescribed above shall include only fund-based IBL within India,
including inter-bank liabilities in foreign currency to a bank operating
within India.
requirements.object: within India, including inter-bank liabilities in foreign currency to a bank operating within India

requirements.full_sentence: The IBL outside India shall be excluded.

(4) The IBL limits shall not include collateralized borrowings under Tri-Party
Repo (TREPS) and refinance from NABARD, SIDBI, etc.
requirements.object: Tri-Party Repo (TREPS) and refinance from NABARD, SIDBI, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank having high concentration of wholesale deposits or deposits in excess
of threshold as approved by the Board shall frame suitable policies to monitor
volatile liabilities and contain the liquidity risk arising out of excessive
dependence on such deposits, both in normal and stress situations.
requirements.object: monitor volatile liabilities and contain the liquidity risk arising out of excessive dependence on such deposits, both in n

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall manage its mismatched currency position as it not only exposes
the balance sheet to movements in exchange rate, but also exposes it to
country risk and settlement risk.
requirements.object: position as it not only exposes the balance sheet to movements in exchange rate, but also exposes it to country risk an

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank with Authorised Dealer (AD) license shall set gap limits and also adopt
Value at Risk (VaR) approach to measure the risk associated with forward
exposures.
requirements.object: also adopt Value at Risk (VaR) approach to measure the risk associated with forward exposures

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall use the Traditional Gap Analysis (TGA) to measure the IRR.
requirements.object: Analysis (TGA) to measure the IRR

requirements.full_sentence:
Gap analysis means measurement of 'Gap', i.e., mismatches between rate
sensitive liabilities (RSL) and rate sensitive assets (RSA) (including off-balance
sheet positions) through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive
liabilities, assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to
residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.

Under TGA, a bank shall ascertain Gap or Mismatch risk as at a given date by
calculating Gaps, i.e., mismatches between rate sensitive liabilities and rate
sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet positions, by preparing Interest
Rate Sensitivity (IRS) statement provided in Annex-III.
requirements.object: risk as at a given date by calculating Gaps, i

requirements.full_sentence:
The various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities and off-balance sheet
items shall be classified in the format of IRS statement as provided in Annex-III,
based on guidance provided in Annex-V.
requirements.object: format of IRS statement as provided in Annex-III, based on guidance provided in Annex-V

requirements.full_sentence:
The Gaps shall be identified in the
following time buckets:
(1) 1-28 days
<image>
(2) 29 days and upto 3 months
(3) Over 3 months and upto 6 months
(4) Over 6 months and upto 1 year
(5) Over 1 year and upto 3 years
(6) Over 3 years and upto 5 years
(7) Over 5 years
(8) Non-sensitive
requirements.object: following time buckets: (1) 1-28 days <image> (2) 29 days and upto 3 months (3) Over 3 months and upto 6 months (4) Over 6 months

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board / Management Committee.
requirements.object: individual Gaps with the approval of the Board / Management Committee

requirements.full_sentence:
The prudential limits shall have a bearing on
the Total Assets, Earning Assets or Equity.
requirements.object: the Total Assets, Earning Assets or Equity

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also work out EaR or
NIM based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with
the approval of the Board / Management Committee.
requirements.object: or NIM based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the Board / Management Committee

requirements.full_sentence:
The classification of various components of assets and liabilities into different
time buckets for preparation of Gap reports (Liquidity and Interest Rate
Sensitivity) as indicated in Annex-IV & Annex-V shall be the benchmark.

A bank
which is better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects of various
components of assets and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies
shall classify them in the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the
ALCO / Board.
requirements.object: appropriate time buckets

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the note approved by the ALCO / Board shall be sent
to the Department of Supervision (DoS), RBI.
requirements.object: Department of Supervision (DoS), RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
Given that the magnitude of embedded option risk in times of volatility in market
interest rates is quite substantial, a bank shall evolve suitable mechanism,
supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future
behaviour of assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet items to changes in market
variables and estimate the embedded options.
requirements.object: by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities and off-bal

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall implement scientifically evolved ITP model as part of the ALM
system.
requirements.object: model as part of the ALM system

requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer pricing mechanism shall assign values on the basis of
current market rates to funds provided and funds used.
requirements.object: basis of current market rates to funds provided and funds used

requirements.full_sentence:
The transfer price
mechanism shall facilitate management of margins, including lending / credit
spread, funding / liability spread, and mismatch spread.
requirements.object: including lending / credit spread, funding / liability spread, and mismatch spread

requirements.full_sentence:
The ITP mechanism
shall centralise IRR for effective control and management of IRR and provide a
rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities.
requirements.object: control and management of IRR and provide a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall prepare the SLS on a daily basis and put up to ALCO / Top
Management.
requirements.object: a daily basis and put up to ALCO / Top Management

requirements.full_sentence:
For reporting INR rate sensitive assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet
positions, the IRS statement shall be prepared on a monthly basis and
submitted to the ALCO / Top Management.
requirements.object: monthly basis and submitted to the ALCO / Top Management

requirements.full_sentence:
It should also be placed before the
bank's Board in the next meeting.
requirements.object: the bank's Board in the next meeting

requirements.full_sentence:
Top Management / Board shall formulate
corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed.
requirements.object: devise suitable strategies wherever needed

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall submit SLS to DoS, RBI, on fortnightly basis (first and third
Wednesday of every month) and IRS statement on a monthly basis.
requirements.object: RBI, on fortnightly basis (first and third Wednesday of every month) and IRS statement on a monthly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
<image>
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

Demand Deposits (Current and Savings Bank Deposits)
Savings Bank and Current Deposits may be classified into volatile and core portions.
requirements.object: and core portions

requirements.full_sentence: This portion may be treated as volatile.

While volatile portion can be placed in the Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days time buckets, depending upon the experience and estimates of banks and the core portion may be placed in over 1- 3 years bucket.
requirements.object: 1- 3 years bucket

requirements.full_sentence: However, the wholesale deposits should be shown under respective maturity buckets.
requirements.object: maturity buckets

requirements.full_sentence: (such deposits for the purpose of this statement may be ₹15 Lakhs or any such higher threshold approved by the bank's Board).
requirements.object: any such higher threshold approved by the bank's Board)

conditions: Where call / put options are built into the issue structure of any instrument/s
requirements.full_sentence: Where call / put options are built into the issue structure of any instrument/s, the call / put date/s should be reckoned as the maturity date/s and the amount should be shown in the respective time buckets.
requirements.object: maturity date/s and the amount should be shown in the respective time buckets

requirements.full_sentence: which are known to the banks and any other contingency may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
requirements.object: maturity buckets

requirements.full_sentence: The event cash outflows, including incremental SLR requirement should be reported against "Outflows - Others".
requirements.object: - Others"

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) All overdue liabilities may be placed in the Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates.
requirements.object: Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Interest and instalments from advances and investments, which are overdue for less than one month may be placed in
Day 1, 2-7 days and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates.
requirements.object: 1, 2-7 days and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates

requirements.full_sentence: Further, interest and instalments due (before classification as NPAs) may be placed in '29 days to 3 months bucket' if the earlier receivables remain uncollected.
requirements.object: days to 3 months bucket' if the earlier receivables remain uncollected

conditions: In case the net cumulative negative mismatches during the Day 1
requirements.full_sentence:
Financing of Gap

In case the net cumulative negative mismatches during the Day 1, 2-7 days, 8-14 days, and 15- 28 days buckets exceed the prudential limit of 5 per cent ,10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets, the bank may show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits.
requirements.object: a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits

requirements.full_sentence: (i) Bills Payable (i) The core component which could reasonably be estimated on the basis of past data and behavioural pattern may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' time bucket.
requirements.object: 1-3 years' time bucket

requirements.full_sentence: The balance amount may be placed in Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, as per behavioural pattern.
requirements.object: 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, as per behavioural pattern

requirements.full_sentence: Items not representing cash payables (i.e., income received in advance, etc.) may be placed in over 5 years bucket.
requirements.object: 5 years bucket

requirements.full_sentence: Balances with RBI While the excess balance over the required CRR / SLR may be shown under Day 1 bucket, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with a time-lag of 14 days.
requirements.object: 1 bucket, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with

requirements.full_sentence: Balances with other Banks (i) Current Account (i) Non-withdrawable portion on account of stipulations of minimum balances may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under Day 1 bucket.
requirements.object: 1-3 years' bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under Day 1 bucket

requirements.full_sentence: Investments classified as NPIs should be shown under over 3-5 years bucket (sub-standard) or over 5 years bucket (doubtful).
requirements.object: 3-5 years bucket (sub-standard) or over 5 years bucket (doubtful)

requirements.full_sentence: # Provisions may be netted from the gross investments provided provisions are held security-wise.
requirements.object: gross investments provided provisions are held security-wise

requirements.full_sentence: Otherwise provisions should be shown in over 5 years bucket.
requirements.object: 5 years bucket

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) Banks should undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified.
requirements.object: behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified

requirements.full_sentence: While the volatile portion could be shown in the near-term maturity buckets, the core portion may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' bucket.
requirements.object: 1-3 years' bucket

requirements.full_sentence: (iii) Term Loans (iii) Interim cash flows may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
requirements.object: maturity buckets

requirements.full_sentence: Fixed Assets / Assets on lease 'Over 5 years' bucket / Interim cash flows may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
requirements.object: maturity buckets

requirements.full_sentence:
Other Assets

(i) Intangible assets Intangible assets and assets not representing cash receivables may be shown in 'Over 5 years' bucket.
requirements.object: 5 years' bucket

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) Banks should undertake a study of the behavioural and seasonal pattern of potential availments in the accounts and the amounts so arrived at may be shown under relevant maturity buckets upto 12 months.
requirements.object: maturity buckets upto 12 months

requirements.full_sentence: Thus, historical trend analysis ought to be conducted on the devolvements and the amounts so arrived at in respect of outstanding Letters of Credit / Guarantees (net of margins) should be distributed amongst various time buckets.
requirements.object: time buckets

requirements.full_sentence: The assets created out of devolvements may be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates.
requirements.object: maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates

requirements.full_sentence: This may be included in over 3-6 months bucket.
requirements.object: 3-6 months bucket

requirements.full_sentence: The non-interest paying portion may be shown in non- sensitive bucket.
requirements.object: sensitive bucket

requirements.full_sentence: The amounts should be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity.
requirements.object: buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity

conditions: in case of floating rate term deposits
requirements.full_sentence: However, in case of floating rate term deposits, the amounts may be shown under the time bucket when deposits contractually become due for repricing.
requirements.object: time bucket when deposits contractually become due for repricing

requirements.full_sentence: The amounts should be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining maturity.
requirements.object: buckets on the basis of remaining maturity

requirements.full_sentence: The amounts should be distributed to the appropriate bucket which refers to the repricing date.
requirements.object: appropriate bucket which refers to the repricing date

requirements.full_sentence: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
requirements.object: respective maturity buckets

requirements.full_sentence:
Repos / Bills Re-discounted (DUPN), Reprices only on maturity and should be distributed to the respective maturity
<image>
Swaps (Buy / Sell) etc.
requirements.object: respective maturity <image> Swaps (Buy / Sell) etc

requirements.full_sentence: Balances with RBI Interest earning portion may be shown in over 3 - 6 months bucket.
requirements.object: 3 - 6 months bucket

requirements.full_sentence: Thus, each bank should foresee the direction of interest rate movements of funding options and capture the amounts in the respective maturity buckets which coincides with the time taken by banks to effect changes in PLR in response to changes in market interest rates.
requirements.object: interest rate movements of funding options and capture the amounts in the respective maturity buckets which coincides with th

requirements.full_sentence: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets corresponding to the cash flow dates.
requirements.object: respective maturity buckets corresponding to the cash flow dates

requirements.full_sentence:
Other products (Interest Rate)

i) Swaps Sensitive and should be distributed under different buckets with reference to maturity.
requirements.object: buckets with reference to maturity

requirements.full_sentence: ii) Other Derivatives Should be suitably classified as and when introduced.
